query.text: select stt_rec_tt, sum(tt_qd) as tt_qd into #v from @@prime$partition$current where stt_rec = @stt_rec group by stt_rec_tt select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmtk b on a.tk_no = b.tk left join dmkh c on a.ma_kh_i = c.ma_kh left join cttt30 d on a.stt_rec_tt = d.stt_rec left join m51$$partition$current e on a.stt_rec = e.stt_rec left join #v f on a.stt_rec_tt = f.stt_rec_tt left join dmtk t on a.tk_thue = t.tk where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec order by a.line_nbr
